sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current state after RIGHT.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("=== Green boxes ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"id={n['id']} boundary={n['boundary']} children={n['children']}")
        for cid in n['children']:
            child = next((x for x in seg['nodes'] if x['id'] == cid), None)
            if child:
                print(f"  child: color={child['color']} boundary={child['boundary']}")

# ASCII check
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== ASCII center ===")
for i in range(29, 35):
    print(f"Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][15:35]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
